description_long: This is a modern blue coupe car with a streamlined, aerodynamic body and a compact, sporty silhouette. The vehicle features a sloped roofline, a short rear deck, and a pronounced front grille with chrome accents. The windows are tinted black, and the car is equipped with alloy wheels and low-profile tires, enhancing its performance-oriented appearance. The side mirrors are body-colored, and the door handles are integrated smoothly into the doors. The rear of the car includes a subtle spoiler and dual exhaust outlets, while the front showcases angular headlights and a wide lower air intake. The overall design suggests a focus on both style and agility, suitable for urban and suburban environments.
description: A sleek blue coupe car with a sporty, aerodynamic design, tinted windows, and alloy wheels. It features a sloped roofline, chrome-accented grille, and a compact, stylish profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, angular headlights, and smooth hood with a central crease.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the coupe's two-door configuration, sloped roofline, and alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the subtle spoiler, dual exhausts, and large rear window.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the streamlined profile and tinted windows.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
